sectionIntro.title: From application to disbursement
sectionIntro.description: A straightforward four-step journey, guided by a field officer at every stage — designed so first-time borrowers never feel lost in paperwork.

steps.title: Apply
steps.description: Submit a simple application online or at your nearest centre with basic identity, address, and income details.

steps.title: Verification
steps.description: A field officer visits to verify your details, understand your business or household needs, and explain loan terms in person.

steps.title: Approval
steps.description: Our credit team reviews the application and verification report, and communicates the approved amount and repayment schedule.

steps.title: Fund Disbursement
steps.description: Approved funds are transferred directly to your bank account, along with a copy of your signed loan agreement.
